title: StrobeBlackVideo Property
description: Determines whether video is cleared to black before the trigger is received.
notes:
When RuntimeAcquire is set to Strobed, and VRun executes, by default the video is cleared to black until a trigger is received.  For some applications, such as conveyor tracking, it may be easier to see vision results if the video is not cleared to black after each VRun.

See Also: StrobeBlackVideo Property
